prompt.content:
Update the merger model with share prices for RMBS, MTSI, ONTO, and SLAB as of the close on 1/5/26. In addition, in each scenario:
- revise SG&A synergies down 1000 basis points
- triple the advisory fee percentage
- increase RMBS's number of shares outstanding by 10% and decrease each target's number of shares outstanding by the same percentage

Bid premiums in each scenario should then be updated as follows:
- 30% for the target with the highest share price as of the close on 1/5/26
- 20% for the target with the second highest
- 10% for the target with the lowest

Cash consideration in each scenario should then be updated as follows:
- 75% for the target with the lowest share price as of the close on 1/5/26
- 50% for the target with the second lowest
- 25% for the target with the highest 

Output the % accretion/dilution to RMBS shareholders in each scenario rounded to two decimal places. Then calculate the average % accretion/dilution to RMBS shareholders across all three scenarios.

rubrics.name: States RMBS shareholder accretion/dilution in the MTSI scenario is -5.36%... (ver_42e096c89dc1401cbd84f16d4d0ae2ec)

messages.content: States RMBS shareholder accretion/dilution in the MTSI scenario is -5.36% (acceptable range -5.41% to -5.31%).

rubrics.name: States RMBS shareholder accretion/dilution in the ONTO scenario is 1.65%... (ver_84ec567efc7148ffa1d0395e9879d2f5)

messages.content: States RMBS shareholder accretion/dilution in the ONTO scenario is 1.65% (acceptable range 1.63% to 1.67%).

rubrics.name: States RMBS shareholder accretion/dilution in the SLAB scenario is -22.82%... (ver_ecc9167306584f87b5e4f691003620ef)

messages.content: States RMBS shareholder accretion/dilution in the SLAB scenario is -22.82% (acceptable range -23.05% to -22.59%).

rubrics.name: States average RMBS shareholder accretion/dilution is -8.84% (acceptable range... (ver_9c2fa167d84d4a2fabdbb86cf5d94fb0)

messages.content: States average RMBS shareholder accretion/dilution is -8.84% (acceptable range -8.93% to -8.75%).

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
RMBS shareholder accretion/dilution in the MTSI scenario is -5.36%
RMBS shareholder accretion/dilution in the ONTO scenario is 1.65%
RMBS shareholder accretion/dilution in the SLAB scenario is -22.82%
Average RMBS shareholder accretion/dilution is -8.84%
